name: triage
description: Triage a failing test or paged-alert: reproduce, localise, propose the smallest fix. Uses tooling explicitly.
prompt_template:
Triage the following report:

```
${report}
```

Follow the ATELIER.md 'Triage pipeline': Reproduce → Localize → Reduce → Fix → Guard with regression coverage → Verify end-to-end.

Use the read_file, grep, and shell tools to confirm — do not speculate. If reproduction requires standing up a service or running a long-running command, say so and stop rather than guessing.

args.name: report
args.description: The failing-test output, paged alert, or bug report to triage.

proactive_trigger: Suggest when the user pastes a stack trace, a failing-test output block, an alert page, or asks to 'debug' / 'reproduce' a named issue.
